❤️ Happy Birthday Queen ❤️

made with love · just for you 🤍

Happy Birthday, Aldmeanies Queen 👑,

Another yearrrr, but thankfully those sexy legs are still looking marvelousssssss!

On a more serious note, I just want to tell you how much I appreciate you. From the very beginning, you've been there for me and have become one of the most important friends in my life. What started turned into a bond that goes far beyond.

Through all the ups and downs, the breakiessss, the huggiess, the laughyyyyy, the drama-yyyyy, the gossip-yyyy, and everything in between, you've been someone I can talk to about anything.

Thank you for your kindness, your support, your honesty, and for always being you. Life has thrown both of us a few unexpected twists lately, but one thing I'm grateful for is the friendship we've built along the way.

Whether you end up back in the Philippines, walking daily and growing those famous sexy legs even more, or decide to move to Penang and become a full-time island princess, I hope life takes you somewhere that makes you genuinely happy. Wherever you go, I know you'll leave your wonderful heart with everyone lucky enough to know you.

Thank you for being such a valuable part of my life, Princess. I truly cherish our friendship and all the memories we've shared. I hope our paths cross again very soon because good friends like you are hard to find.

Wishing you happiness, success, good health, lots of laughter, and of course, many more years of maintaining those legendary sexy legs.

Happy Birthday, Queen! ❤️

With lots of love, appreciation, and tight huggiesss!!!!! 🤗
